html:div.html:p: This library defines context-independent elements for Dengue used throughout the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Dengue Primary Series Doses Administered to Patient
Number of Dengue Primary Series Doses Administered
Client's age is less than 9 years
Client's age is more than 45 years
No dengue primary series doses were administered
Client's age is between 9 years and 45 years
One dengue primary series dose was administered
The latest dengue dose was administered less than 6 months ago
The latest dengue dose was administered more than 6 months ago
Two dengue primary series doses were administered
Three dengue primary series doses were administered

description.value: This library defines context-independent elements for Dengue used throughout the Immunization CPG
